commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds Mistral prompt-cache-key compat, separates cache-key support from long-retention support, updates bundled Mistral cached-read prices, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +146. Total +166 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main lacks Mistral cache-key compat and has zero Mistral cached-read prices, and the PR body demonstrates the changed request-shaping path with production functions.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can add the missing doctor migration, regression coverage, and docs correction on top of this PR branch.

target.title: fix(mistral): enable prompt cache key compat
target.body:
Fixes #83709.

## Summary
- mark bundled Mistral OpenAI-compatible models as supporting `prompt_cache_key`
- keep Mistral compat normalization and resolved-compat reuse checks aware of cache-key support without advertising unsupported long retention
- price bundled Mistral cached reads at the documented 10% input-token rate and add regression coverage for nonzero cached-token cost

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/mistral/api.test.ts extensions/mistral/model-definitions.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/llm/providers/openai-completions.test.ts src/agents/provider-attribution.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/mistral/api.ts extensions/mistral/api.test.ts extensions/mistral/model-definitions.test.ts extensions/mistral/openclaw.plugin.json src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/llm/providers/openai-completions.ts src/llm/providers/openai-completions.test.ts packages/llm-core/src/types.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/mistral/api.ts extensions/mistral/api.test.ts extensions/mistral/model-definitions.test.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/llm/providers/openai-completions.ts src/llm/providers/openai-completions.test.ts packages/llm-core/src/types.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: Mistral model compat did not advertise `supportsPromptCacheKey`, so the shared OpenAI-compatible transport omitted `prompt_cache_key` for Mistral even when a cache key was available; once cache keys are enabled, cached-token usage also needs a nonzero Mistral `cacheRead` price.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on Linux, Node 22-compatible repo tooling, PR head `200cc7f6a202480d720b1ca578dd163c1106df71`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node --import tsx/esm --input-type=module` script importing `applyMistralModelCompat`, `buildMistralModelDefinition`, and `buildOpenAICompletionsParams`, then constructing a Mistral request with `promptCacheKey: "mistral-cache-key"` and calculating cached-read cost from the bundled model catalog.
- Evidence after fix:
```text
{
  "model": "mistral-large-latest",
  "supportsPromptCacheKey": true,
  "supportsLongCacheRetention": false,
  "prompt_cache_key": "mistral-cache-key",
  "prompt_cache_retention_present": false,
  "cacheReadRate": 0.05,
  "cacheReadCostFor20000Tokens": 0.001
}
```
- Observed result after fix: The actual OpenClaw Mistral model definition normalizes to `supportsPromptCacheKey: true`, the OpenAI-compatible completions request contains `prompt_cache_key`, long retention remains disabled for Mistral, and cached-token cost is nonzero using the bundled default Mistral model rate.
- What was not tested: A live Mistral API cache hit was not run because this environment has no `MISTRAL_API_KEY`; cache-hit timing is also best-effort. The implementation is backed by source-level production-function proof plus focused tests, and pricing follows Mistral's prompt-caching docs.
target.author: alix-007

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
